creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
Hello Iara, thank you for submitting the port. The maintainer in the port is itbot@bk.ru while your email is itbot@list.ru. Did you forget to change it?

There is an extra include file that isn't required. .include <bsd.port.options.mk>, please remove this.

Please update the port to the most current version as well while you're at it, looks to be 0.5.0.
